description_long: This sculpture depicts a majestic winged horse with a prominent unicorn horn, rearing up on its hind legs. The wings are fully outstretched, displaying detailed feather textures and a sense of dynamic motion. The horse's mane and tail are sculpted with flowing lines, adding to the sense of movement and grace. The body is muscular and well-proportioned, with defined legs and hooves. The surface appears to be made of a dark, stone-like material, giving the sculpture a weathered and timeless appearance. The overall form is dramatic and mythological, evoking the legendary Pegasus or unicorn from classical mythology.
description: A dramatic sculpture of a winged horse with a unicorn horn, rearing with outstretched wings and detailed feather and muscle textures. The dark, stone-like surface enhances its mythological presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horse's face, unicorn horn, and both wings fully extended outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the raised front legs, detailed wing feathers, and flowing tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings and the back of the horse's body and tail.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the other side of the wings, the unicorn horn, and the dynamic pose.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological winged horse with unicorn horn (Pegasus-unicorn hybrid)
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
